title: REST API endpoints — GET /api/reviews, POST accept/reject
task: Add REST routes in App.js run() method: GET /api/reviews (pending only), GET /api/reviews/all (all reviews), POST /api/reviews/:id/accept (apply category + tag to Firefly), POST /api/reviews/:id/reject (dismiss without Firefly mutation). Accept endpoint calls fireflyService.setCategory + addTag.
acceptance: GET /api/reviews returns { success: true, reviews: [...pending], count }
GET /api/reviews/all returns { success: true, reviews: [...all], count }
POST /api/reviews/:id/accept applies chosen category to Firefly via setCategory
POST /api/reviews/:id/accept returns { success: true, review } with updated status
POST /api/reviews/:id/reject returns { success: true, review } without Firefly mutation
Both accept/reject return 404 { success: false, error: 'Review not found' } for missing id
Both accept/reject return 500 with error message on Firefly API failure
req.body.category optional on accept (falls back to recommendation.preferredCategory)
